about.lede: I build for the hard problems — the ones that only move when the engineering is real.
about.body: Founder, independent researcher, engineer. I chase faint signals across machine learning, autonomy, and the edge of what's reliable.

currently.text: Currently building Ephemeris — edge-AI for spacecraft

projects.blurb: Finds the faint signal buried in the noise.

projects.blurb: A sentinel for health data — drift, gaps, and anomalies caught before a model sees them.

projects.name: Ask My Paper
projects.blurb: Ask a question, get answers grounded in the papers themselves.

projects.name: Donna
projects.blurb: An agent that keeps the work organized and moving.
